items.title: Last.fm goes independent after breaking up with Paramount Skydance
items.summary: Last.fm is now an independent company, nearly two decades after it was acquired by CBS.

items.title: Google engineer charged with insider trading after making $1.2M on Polymarket
items.summary: According to the complaint, a Google engineer risked over $2.7 million on wagers related to Google's 2025 Year in Search campaign.
